mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order ( order_no, warehouse_id, source_no, order_type, supplier_name, total_quantity, actual_quantity, order_status, plan_time, remark, dr, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{sourceNo}, #{orderType}, #{supplierName}, #{totalQuantity}, #{actualQuantity}, #{orderStatus}, #{planTime}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )

INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order_detail ( order_id, model_id, motorcycle_id, vin, target_bin_id, plan_quantity, actual_quantity, detail_status, remark, create_by, update_by ) VALUES
( #{d.orderId}, #{d.modelId}, #{d.motorcycleId}, #{d.vin}, #{d.targetBinId}, #{d.plannedQuantity}, 0, 0, #{d.remark}, #{d.createBy}, #{d.updateBy} )
